"use strict"; module.exports = function (it) { const { pluginName, ruleId } = it; return ` A configuration object specifies rule "${ruleId}", but could not find plugin "${pluginName}". Common causes of this problem include: 1. The "${pluginName}" plugin is not defined in your configuration file. 2. The "${pluginName}" plugin is not defined within the same configuration object in which the "${ruleId}" rule is applied. `.trimStart(); };
